CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, str_value VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE additional_strings (id INT, str_value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT CONCAT(str_value, ' - ', (SELECT str_value FROM additional_strings WHERE id = 1)) AS concatenated FROM test_strings WHERE id <= 3;
SELECT CONCAT((SELECT str_value FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1), ' ', (SELECT str_value FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2)) AS concatenated;
SELECT CONCAT(str_value, (SELECT str_value FROM additional_strings LIMIT 1)) AS concatenated FROM test_strings;
SELECT t.id, CONCAT(t.str_value, a.str_value) AS full_string FROM test_strings t JOIN additional_strings a ON t.id = a.id;
SELECT CONCAT('Start: ', (SELECT CONCAT(str_value, ' - ', (SELECT str_value FROM additional_strings WHERE id = 2)) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3)) AS resulting_string;
SELECT CONCAT((SELECT str_value FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4), CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM additional_strings) > 0 THEN ' - Joined' ELSE '' END) AS result_with_case;
SELECT CONCAT('Final: ', CONCAT(t.str_value, ' & ', a.str_value)) AS complex_concat FROM test_strings t CROSS JOIN additional_strings a;
